class BiologyDNAReplicationStory(Scene):

        title = Text("DNA Replication Copies Both Strands", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        left_points = [UP * 2.0 + LEFT * 1.0, UP * 1.2 + LEFT * 0.65, UP * 0.4 + LEFT * 1.05, DOWN * 0.4 + LEFT * 0.7, DOWN * 1.2 + LEFT * 1.05, DOWN * 2.0 + LEFT * 0.7]

        left_strand = VMobject(color=BLUE_D).set_points_smoothly(left_points)
        right_strand = VMobject(color=ORANGE).set_points_smoothly(right_points)
        rungs = VGroup(*[Line(lp, rp, color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=4) for lp, rp in zip(left_points, right_points)])
        new_left = VGroup(*[Rectangle(width=0.4, height=0.18, stroke_width=0, fill_color=TEAL_D, fill_opacity=0.85).move_to((right_points[i] + right_points[i] + LEFT * 0.55) / 2) for i in range(len(right_points))])
        new_right = VGroup(*[Rectangle(width=0.4, height=0.18, stroke_width=0, fill_color=YELLOW_D, fill_opacity=0.85).move_to((left_points[i] + left_points[i] + RIGHT * 0.55) / 2) for i in range(len(left_points))])

        caption_c = Text("New complementary pieces form on both sides until two copies exist.", font_size=23, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(left_strand), Create(right_strand), LaggedStart(*[Create(r) for r in rungs], lag_ratio=0.08), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=5)

from manim import *

class BiologyNeuronSignalStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Neural Signals Travel in a Clear Direction", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        soma = Circle(radius=0.55, color=BLUE_D, fill_opacity=0.18).shift(LEFT * 1.3)
        dendrites = VGroup(Line(soma.get_left(), soma.get_left() + LEFT * 1.2 + UP * 0.7, color=BLUE_B), Line(soma.get_left(), soma.get_left() + LEFT * 1.3, color=BLUE_B), Line(soma.get_left(), soma.get_left() + LEFT * 1.15 + DOWN * 0.8, color=BLUE_B))
        axon = VMobject(color=ORANGE, stroke_width=5).set_points_smoothly([soma.get_right(), RIGHT * 0.6 + UP * 0.15, RIGHT * 2.1 + DOWN * 0.2, RIGHT * 3.6 + UP * 0.05])
        terminals = VGroup(*[Line(axon.get_end(), axon.get_end() + RIGHT * 0.55 + offset, color=ORANGE, stroke_width=4) for offset in [UP * 0.4, ORIGIN, DOWN * 0.4]])
        labels = VGroup(Text("dendrites", font_size=22, color=BLUE_B).next_to(dendrites, UP, buff=0.15), Text("soma", font_size=22, color=BLUE_D).next_to(soma, DOWN, buff=0.15), Text("axon", font_size=22, color=ORANGE).next_to(axon, UP, buff=0.2))
        pulse = Dot(dendrites[1].get_start(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        pulse_path = VMobject().set_points_smoothly([dendrites[1].get_end(), soma.get_center(), *axon.points[::3], axon.get_end()])
        caption_a = Text("Signals arrive through the dendrites and gather at the soma.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("From there the pulse travels along the axon toward the terminals.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The direction matters: input first, output last.", font_size=23, color=GRAY_D).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(soma), Create(dendrites), Create(axon), Create(terminals), FadeIn(labels), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=5)
        self.play(FadeIn(pulse), MoveAlongPath(pulse, pulse_path), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=7, rate_func=linear)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[Indicate(t) for t in terminals], lag_ratio=0.2), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class SignalSamplingAliasingStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Sampling Can Create an Alias", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 8, 1], y_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 0.5], x_length=7.0, y_length=4.4, tips=False).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        true_wave = axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(2.2 * x), x_range=[0, 8], color=BLUE_D)
        sample_xs = np.linspace(0.5, 7.5, 8)
        sample_points = [axes.c2p(x, np.sin(2.2 * x)) for x in sample_xs]
        alias_wave = VMobject(color=ORANGE, stroke_width=4).set_points_smoothly(sample_points)
        samples = VGroup(*[Dot(point, color=YELLOW, radius=0.07) for point in sample_points])
        caption_a = Text("The true signal oscillates quickly between the sample times.", font_size=23, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Connecting the samples can suggest a much slower-looking wave.", font_size=23, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("That mismatch is the aliasing problem.", font_size=23, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), Create(true_wave), FadeIn(caption_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(dot) for dot in samples], lag_ratio=0.1), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(alias_wave), ReplacementTransform(caption_a, caption_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(Indicate(alias_wave), Indicate(samples), ReplacementTransform(caption_b, caption_c), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)

from manim import *

class CommunicationsModulationStory(Scene):

        message_axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 6.5, 1], y_range=[-1.4, 1.4, 0.5], x_length=5.6, y_length=2.0, tips=False).to_edge(LEFT).shift(UP * 1.1)
        carrier_axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 6.5, 1], y_range=[-1.4, 1.4, 0.5], x_length=5.6, y_length=2.0, tips=False).to_edge(LEFT).shift(DOWN * 1.4)
        mod_axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 6.5, 1], y_range=[-1.8, 1.8, 0.5], x_length=5.6, y_length=4.4, tips=False).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(DOWN * 0.2)
        message = message_axes.plot(lambda x: 0.8 * np.sin(1.2 * x), x_range=[0, 6.2], color=BLUE_D)
        carrier = carrier_axes.plot(lambda x: np.sin(8 * x), x_range=[0, 6.2], color=GRAY_B)
